item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 5min There’s a lot of ‘think of the LIV staff’ doing the rounds and it comes from a good place
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 5min There’s a lot of ‘think of the LIV staff’ doing the rounds and it comes from a good place, but I think it’s a bit much. I’d liken it to people joking about how much Musk has ruined twitter, or mocking a hapless politician, or even hoping a football team gets relegated. 1 6 805

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 2min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf If Spurs or Forest get relegated, it’s possible that leads
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 2min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf If Spurs or Forest get relegated, it’s possible that leads to job losses. Musk fired a load of people, many of them ‘good’ I’m sure, but should you have to think of them before doing a meme? I don’t know about that. When a politician loses their seat, others are worse affected. 1 1 243

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf should be taken as a given that nobody is rejoicing in some
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf should be taken as a given that nobody is rejoicing in somebody in some back office losing a job they’ve been diligently going about. Anyone doing that should be shouted down or ignored. Personally don’t think that should be used as a reason to allow liars and gaslighters a pass. 113

item.title: Mike_kim714: Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 6min I was getting ready to hit my tee shot on 18 with my 3 wd and noticed a decent sized
item.description:
Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 6min I was getting ready to hit my tee shot on 18 with my 3 wd and noticed a decent sized crack on the face
All the trucks are gone so the rep is trying to get it shipped overnight.
My head pro from home is also shipping my back up from my locker.
For now, I stole Max Homa’s Mostrar más 20 3 238 10 mil

item.title: AdamCrafton_: Josh Carpenter reposteó Adam Crafton @AdamCrafton_ · 32min LIV Golf is on the brink. Saudi backers PIF, who have squande
item.description:
Josh Carpenter reposteó Adam Crafton @AdamCrafton_ · 32min LIV Golf is on the brink. Saudi backers PIF, who have squandered billions on the project, close to withdrawing. Exec team members looking for new jobs.
LIV and Saudi PIF not responded to requests for comments since early Tuesday evening. De nytimes.com 7 63 205 36 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 17min JUST IN — The @nytimes is reporting that high level LIV executives have begun their own
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 17min JUST IN — The @nytimes is reporting that high level LIV executives have begun their own personal job searches as the future of the league is now in doubt. Members of the leadership team were informed on Sunday after The Masters that they would soon “lose their positions.” Mostrar más 17 21 230 23 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 16min En respuesta a @NUCLRGOLF STORY: De nytimes.com 2 3 5 mil
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 16min En respuesta a @NUCLRGOLF STORY: De nytimes.com 2 3 5 mil
